out_of_scope_note: Molecular neurobiology of major depressive disorder: identifies lipocalin-2 (LCN2) as a mediator of microglia-driven neuroinflammation in a chronic unpredictable stress mouse model, with knockdown / neutralizing-antibody manipulations alleviating depressive-like behaviors via mitochondrial-dynamics regulation. No theoretical computational-neuroscience framework (no perceptual / decision / encoding / cognitive model); content is clinical-MDD biomarker plus molecular and behavioral assays — out of lab scope per OOS rule (clinical / molecular biology without neural-computation content).
